query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A twilight scene under a deep cyan-blue sky with two stationary freight train cars positioned on either side of a large dark evergreen tree. A bright multi-pointed light source glows directly above the tree. Horizontal red and orange luminous bands span the lower portion of the frame, partially overlaying the train cars and foreground vegetation. The right train car is a weathered beige with dark text and numerical markings, while the left train car is a solid dark color. Low grass and ground cover appear along the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The photograph employs intentional motion blur through a long exposure, rendering passing lights as sweeping horizontal red and orange streaks that cut across the lower portion of the frame. Behind the luminous trails, two freight train cars sit on tracks flanking a large silhouetted evergreen tree under a deep cyan sky, with a bright starburst light source positioned directly above the tree. The softening effect of the motion blur creates a dynamic, dreamlike impression that contrasts with the static industrial elements.
